subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that, through His infinite divine bounties, thou hast turned toward the sanctuary of oneness and attained unto the Kawthar of reunion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از فیوضات نامتناهیه الهیه بشطر احدیه توجه نمودی و بکوثر وصال فائز
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
